meta.title: GCB Lite — Try in your browser
meta.description: A live WordPress install in your browser with the gcb-lite plugin, the GCB Abstrak demo theme, and a fully composed home page. Edit any block to see the typed-field Inspector on the right.
meta.author: wordpress-gcb

steps.data:
<?php // mu-plugin: defines GCBLITE_LOAD_EXAMPLES before gcb-lite's init runs.
if (!defined('GCBLITE_LOAD_EXAMPLES')) { define('GCBLITE_LOAD_EXAMPLES', true); }

options.blogdescription: Typed Gutenberg blocks rendered as React. File-based schemas. No UI authoring.

steps.code:
<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; flush_rewrite_rules(true); function gcb_pg_upsert($post_type, $marker, $data, $meta = []) { $existing = get_posts(['post_type' => $post_type, 'meta_key' => '_gcblite_seed_marker', 'meta_value' => $marker, 'post_status' => 'any', 'numberposts' => 1]); $id = $existing ? wp_update_post(array_merge(['ID' => $existing[0]->ID], $data)) : wp_insert_post(array_merge($data, ['post_type' => $post_type, 'post_status' => 'publish'])); if (!$existing) update_post_meta($id, '_gcblite_seed_marker', $marker); foreach ($meta as $k => $v) update_post_meta($id, $k, $v); return $id; } $base = get_stylesheet_directory_uri() . '/assets/images'; foreach ([['Postwave CMS Marketing','SaaS site','project-1.png','https://postwave.example'],['Beacon Analytics Dashboard','Web app','project-4.png','https://beacon.example'],['Glide Editorial','Publishing','project-2.png','https://glide.example']] as $p) { [$t, $cat, $img, $u] = $p; gcb_pg_upsert('project', 'project:'.sanitize_title($t), ['post_title' => $t, 'post_excerpt' => 'Designed and shipped end-to-end on GCB.'], ['cover' => ['url' => $base.'/project/'.$img, 'alt' => $t, 'width' => 800, 'height' => 500], 'live_url' => ['url' => $u, 'text' => 'Visit site', 'opensInNewTab' => true]]); } foreach ([['Maya Hernandez','Senior Frontend Engineer','Postwave','Editor preview and the live site are the same React component.'],['Jordan Ito','Editor-in-Chief','Glide','My editors author in Gutenberg, our frontend is Next.js.'],['Sam Okafor','Tech Lead','Beacon','The typed field system is what hooked me.']] as $t) { [$name, $role, $from, $q] = $t; gcb_pg_upsert('testimonial', 'testimonial:'.sanitize_title($name), ['post_title' => $name], ['quote' => '“'.$q.'”', 'author_name' => $name, 'author_role' => $role, 'author_image' => ['url' => 'https://i.pravatar.cc/120?u='.sanitize_title($name), 'alt' => $name], 'from_label' => $from]); } foreach (['Postwave','Beacon','Glide','Northwind','Helio','Atlas'] as $b) { gcb_pg_upsert('brand', 'brand:'.sanitize_title($b), ['post_title' => $b], ['logo' => ['url' => 'https://dummyimage.com/200x60/202020/ffffff&text='.urlencode($b), 'alt' => $b, 'width' => 200, 'height' => 60]]); } $home = '<!-- wp:gcb/abstrak-banner /-->'."

".'<!-- wp:gcb/abstrak-projects /-->'."

".'<!-- wp:gcb/abstrak-testimonials /-->'."

".'<!-- wp:gcb/abstrak-brands {"source":"latest","count":6} /-->'."

".'<!-- wp:gcb/abstrak-cta /-->'; kses_remove_filters(); gcb_pg_upsert('page', 'home-page', ['post_title' => 'Home', 'post_name' => 'home', 'post_content' => $home]); kses_init_filters();
